nasb.text: Every daughter who comes into possession of an inheritance of any tribe of the sons of Israel shall be wife to one of the family of the tribe of her father, so that the sons of Israel each may possess the inheritance of his fathers.

esv.text: And every daughter who possesses an inheritance in any tribe of the people of Israel shall be wife to one of the clan of the tribe of her father, so that every one of the people of Israel may possess the inheritance of his fathers.

cnv.text: 從以色列支派中得了產業的女子，要嫁給自己祖宗支派的人作妻子，好使以色列人可以各自承受自己祖宗的產業。

ccb.text: 继承了产业的女子必须嫁给本支派的人，以便以色列人都能守住自己的祖业。
